content.en:
Detached!

Ye Tian was a little incredulous, if the knowledge said in this book was true, then the author of this book must be a detached person, or know a detached person.

Otherwise, he would not have been able to write such a detailed knowledge of the detached.

Of course, there is also the possibility that the author of this book wrote it blindly, completely relying on fantasy.

But Ye Tian knew very well that the owner of this manor must be an incomparably powerful existence, even if he was not a transcendent, he was also a supreme who defied the sky.

It is impossible for such a being to collect a scribbled book of the Detached.

So it's very likely that this book is true, or even written by a detached person.

"According to my guess, maybe a detached person came here before leaving the universe, and even this world may have been carved out by a detached person. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Except for a few places, most of this manor was visited by Ye Tian, and when there was only one place, Ye Tian did not go in.

In the center of this estate, there is an ancient well.

This ancient well, like the ancient well in many people's homes, looks very ordinary, but there can't be anything ordinary here.

So Ye Tian came to this ancient well again, ready to enter the ancient well to take a look.

It's just that what is inside the ancient well, he doesn't know, his divine sense can't penetrate into the ancient well at all, maybe there is danger in the ancient well, maybe there will be a big opportunity.

Swish!

Ye Tian entered the interior of the ancient well.

In an instant, streamers flashed in Ye Tian's eyes.

At this time, Ye Tian found that he had come to a strange space.

In the middle of this space, there is a lake.

In the lake, it is not ordinary water, but fluorescent water.

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and probed into this strange water and felt it.

Suddenly, a strange energy poured into Ye Tian's palm.

Then this energy slowly tempered Ye Tian's palm, but Ye Tian didn't feel that his strength increased.

After a long time, Ye Tian withdrew his palm from the water and observed it carefully.

"Strange!Nothing has changed!" Ye Tian was extremely puzzled in his heart.

Just now, the palm of his hand was wrapped in strange energy in the water, and he kept refining, he obviously felt that there were countless strange energy that had been consumed, but the palm should have changed, but now the palm has not changed.

Immediately, Ye Tian continued to test his palm, and finally let him find the difference between his palm and the previous one.

When Ye Tian was testing the power of the Great Dao, he suddenly found that after combining the power of the Chaos Avenue with the palm of his hand, it could exert even more terrifying power, and it seemed that this palm was more in line with the power of the Chaos Avenue than before.

"Could it be that this kind of water can make the body more in tune with the power of the Great Dao? "

Ye Tian thought in shock.

If that were the case, then the value of the water would be too high.

Immediately, Ye Tian continued to collect this kind of water, and after collecting a large amount of water.

Ye Tian entered this lake and began to cultivate.

He completely immersed his body in the water, allowing the strange energy of the water to continue to refine his body.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also feeling the Chaos Avenue.

At this time, he was shocked to find that the speed at which he comprehended the Chaos Dao was much faster than before.

And his eyes seemed to see the trajectory of the Great Dao, although it was very vague, but it was enough to prove that Ye Tian's eyes had undergone essential changes under the transformation of this strange water, if there was enough refining of this strange water, Ye Tian's eyes might really be able to observe the trajectory of the Chaos Avenue more intuitively.

Immediately, Ye Tian became excited.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian's body was constantly tempered by this strange water, becoming more and more in line with the power of the Chaos Dao, and his eyes changed more and more.

Rumble!!!

A blast came from outside.

"Someone is coming"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He knew that he couldn't continue to cultivate, and if he continued to cultivate like this, if someone came, this place would be exposed.

So Ye Tian collected all the remaining water and stored it in the Chaos Ancient Realm.

Immediately, Ye Tian flew out of the ancient well space.

As soon as he came out of here, Ye Tian saw a Protoss powerhouse not far away.

And that Protoss powerhouse also saw the day.

"The true monarch of the human race!"

This Protoss powerhouse saw Ye Tian and showed an excited look.

When Ye Tian saw this Protoss powerhouse, his heart was stunned, and a trace of crisis immediately rose.

Although it was only a hint of crisis, it was enough to prove that this Protoss powerhouse was not at the same level as the Protoss galaxy-level peak powerhouse that Ye Tian had seen before.

"This Protoss powerhouse is very powerful!"

Ye Tian had this idea.

"Wanfa Zhenjun, you shouldn't know me, I have lived for many years, and among the Protoss, they are relatively old. Although I am only at the peak realm of the galaxy level, I have already reached the fourth order of life, and my lifespan is eternal. I thought I was the only lonely one in the universe, but I didn't expect that another rebel was born in the universe. If you are also a member of the Protoss, then we can explore the path together and follow the path of the transcendent. It's a pity that you are a member of the Terran race, and you are destined to be the enemy of our Protoss! This time I have another mission, which is to kill you, but I didn't expect to run into you so soon!"

The strong man of the Protoss Lang said.

Hearing the words of this Protoss powerhouse, Ye Tian had some guesses about his identity.

"You are the first one to break through the Ten Tribulations of the Supreme Mountain with an Emperor-level cultivator!" Ye Tian said in surprise.

"That's right, it's me!" the Protoss powerhouse said proudly, "I am the first person in the universe to use an emperor-level cultivator to pass through the Ten Tribulations region in the Supreme Mountain of the Ruins World, and I am also the first to break the confinement at the emperor-level level, become a supreme-level highness, and embark on the path of the Heaven-Defying One." "

"It is rumored that you have died under the thunderstorm, but I didn't expect you to be alive today. What surprised me even more was that you were only at the peak of the galaxy level now. Ye Tian said in surprise.

"Of course I didn't die under the Thunder Tribulation, it was the wind deliberately released by the Protoss!" The Protoss powerhouse said: "But although my strength is strong, I still don't dare to impact the Cosmic God, when I hit the galaxy level, that Thunder Tribulation almost killed me, once I hit the Cosmic God, the Thunder Tribulation will be too terrible." I need to continue to accumulate strength before I can be sure to impact the Cosmic God Realm. If it weren't for the Thunder Tribulation, I would have been a Supreme already!"

Ye Tian didn't refute his words, because the talent of this Protoss powerhouse was indeed terrifying.

If there was really no Thunder Tribulation, this Protoss powerhouse would definitely be already a Supreme, and he might be able to compete with the First Supreme of the Protoss.

It's a pity that once you embark on the path of the Rebel, you can no longer get out of this path, and every time you break through a great realm, you must endure the baptism of thunder.

Obviously, the accumulation of this Protoss powerhouse is still not enough, and he doesn't dare to go through the Cosmic God Thunder Tribulation at all.

"You want to kill me, and coincidentally, I want to kill you too!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.
